token_desc: A GitHub Personal Access Token is required to bypass public API rate limits and to access private repositories.
token_secure_desc: Your token is stored safely in your local browser storage (`localStorage`) and is never sent to any external server. It is only included in direct GitHub API calls.
token_saved_toast_desc: Your GitHub Personal Access Token has been saved successfully.
token_cleared_toast_desc: Your GitHub Personal Access Token has been removed.
tips_desc: GitSparse provides two specialized client-side download modes. Choose the one that best matches your workspace requirement.
tips_direct_desc: Directly fetches the selected files over fast HTTP connections using standard curl or wget.
tips_direct_pros_1: Zero local dependencies (works on any bash shell).
tips_direct_pros_2: Extremely lightweight, does not require Git init locally.
tips_direct_pros_3: Fast for single files or sparse tree paths.
tips_direct_cons_1: Highly prone to GitHub Rate Limits (429) for large volumes (> 10 files).
tips_direct_cons_2: Requires curl or wget installed on local command line.
tips_git_desc: Uses Git's native sparse-checkout combined with a blobless filter to fetch only target assets in 1 connection.
tips_git_pros_3: Incremental updates are safe on repeat executions.
tips_git_cons_1: Creates a localized Git repository history at output target.
tips_git_cons_2: Requires local Git 2.25+ command line tool installed.
tips_advice_desc: When downloading a large volume of files (more than 10 files or major directory nodes), Git Sparse mode is heavily recommended to save local RTT network overhead and completely bypass HTTP 429 requests blockages.
suggest_desc: You have selected more than 10 files. Direct HTTP download might get rate-limited (HTTP 429) or be slow due to multiple TCP connections.
suggest_rec_desc: Switching to Git Sparse mode will package the download into a high-performance shell script utilizing git sparse-checkout. Only 1 connection required!
suggest_switched_toast_desc: Switched to Git Sparse mode successfully.
